name: fullstack-pilot
description: Codebase governance for full-stack Microsoft shops (Angular, .NET, SQL Server, Azure)

plugins.name: pilot-core
plugins.description: Shared governance: stack detection, audit/fix pipelines, MCP discovery, dependency-supply-chain policy (patch SLAs, SBOM), incident-response runbook/postmortem governance, open-source license compliance, safe test-data management, and commands used by every other pilot plugin

plugins.name: pilot-angular
plugins.description: Angular / TypeScript governance: signals, performance, accessibility, security (permissions-ONLY route guards/UI gating), HTTP resilience, the v15-to-v20 upgrade path, coding standards, multi-layout shells, theming, shared UI libraries, JSON-schema-driven dynamic forms, testing conventions, i18n, global error handling, PWA/offline support, frontend telemetry, and Nx/module-federation monorepo governance

plugins.name: pilot-dotnet
plugins.description: C# / ASP.NET Core governance: Clean Architecture, SOLID/DRY, performance, caching, permissions-ONLY auth (no role checks), multitenancy, soft delete, audit fields, CORS, repository pattern, shared libraries, Excel/PDF document I/O, email templating, Guid entity keys, API versioning, modular DI, Hangfire background jobs, DB-backed configuration, localization, HTTP/EF Core resilience, observability, error handling, validation, testing, data protection, concurrency, rate limiting, the transactional outbox pattern, feature flags, real-time/SignalR, compliance access-audit logging, financial/currency precision, secrets rotation, API contract testing, and connection-pool tuning

plugins.name: pilot-sql
plugins.description: SQL Server / EF Core governance: injection defense, migration safety, multitenancy isolation, performance review, PII data protection (Always Encrypted, Dynamic Data Masking, TDE), ongoing index/statistics maintenance, and backup/restore-drill verification

plugins.name: pilot-azure
plugins.description: Azure / Bicep governance: CAF naming, security baseline, Well-Architected Framework review, Bicep patterns, centralized observability, CI/CD deployment security, multi-region disaster recovery, cost/FinOps guardrails, AKS cluster governance, API Management gateway policy review, enterprise-scale landing-zone topology, SLO/error-budget policy, and container image security
